headline: Teradyne (TER) Joins The NASDAQ 100 And Recasts Its Growth Investor Base
summary: Teradyne (NasdaqGS:TER) has been added to the NASDAQ-100 Index and several Russell growth benchmarks in a recent index rebalancing. The company has at the same time been removed from multiple value oriented indices, marking a broad shift in its index affiliations. These changes alter how various index funds and growth focused investors may gain exposure to Teradyne stock. Teradyne is best known for its test equipment and automation solutions that sit at the heart of semiconductor production...
